title: Workpack Protocol Evolution
summary: Meta-group for changes to the Workpack Protocol itself. Tracks protocol specification updates, schema changes, tooling adaptations, and process improvements that evolve how workpacks work — as distinct from any specific project that uses them.

workpacks.title: Prompt Lifecycle Enhancements (B-series DAG + Commit Tracking)

phases.description: First protocol evolution: add B-series dependency DAG and per-prompt commit tracking with integration verification.
